Class MqttIntegrationService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.real.mqtt.MqttIntegrationService
All Implemented Interfaces:
IoTIntegrationService, org.eclipse.paho.client.mqttv3.MqttCallback
public final class MqttIntegrationService extends Object implements IoTIntegrationService, org.eclipse.paho.client.mqttv3.MqttCallback
Real MQTT integration service using Eclipse Paho MQTT client.

Encapsulates all MQTT broker connectivity behind the IoTIntegrationService interface. Connection failures and network issues are handled gracefully without blocking the UI thread.

This service maintains singleton state and connects/disconnects on demand. All MQTT operations run on background threads to prevent UI blocking.

    • getLastSync

      public String getLastSync()
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Returns the timestamp of the last successful synchronization with the broker.
      Specified by:
      getLastSync in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Returns:
      timestamp string (or "Never" if not yet synchronized)

    • getDiscoveredDevices

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<IntegrationDevice> getDiscoveredDevices()

      Returns the list of discovered/paired integration devices.

      getDiscoveredDevices in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Returns:
      observable list of integration devices

    • saveConfiguration

      public void saveConfiguration(boolean enabled, String broker, int port, String username, String password)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Saves broker configuration settings.

      This method updates the configuration but does not automatically connect. Call IoTIntegrationService.connect() to establish a connection after saving.

      Specified by:
      saveConfiguration in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      enabled - whether to enable IoT integration
      broker - broker address
      port - broker port
      username - broker username (optional)
      password - broker password (optional)

    • testConnection

      public boolean testConnection(String brokerAddr, String portValue)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Tests if the given broker and port settings are valid.

      This performs validation without establishing an actual connection. For real implementations, this may attempt a brief connection.

      Specified by:
      testConnection in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      brokerAddr - broker address to test
      portValue - broker port as a string
      Returns:
      true if parameters appear valid, false otherwise

    • connect

      public boolean connect()
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Connects to the MQTT broker with current configuration.

      Connection is only attempted if integration is enabled and broker settings are valid. On successful connection, subscribes to all devices' state topics and updates lastSync.

      Specified by:
      connect in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Returns:
      true if connection was successful, false otherwise

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Disconnects from the MQTT broker and cleans up resources.
      Specified by:
      disconnect in interface IoTIntegrationService

    • refreshDevices

      public boolean refreshDevices()
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Refreshes the list of discovered devices from the broker.

      Only successful if currently connected.

      Specified by:
      refreshDevices in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Returns:
      true if refresh was successful, false if not connected or error occurred

    • publishCommand

      public boolean publishCommand(String deviceId, String command)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Publishes a command to a device's command topic.

      The command is published to smarthome/<deviceId>/cmd. Only successful if connected and the device is paired.

      Specified by:
      publishCommand in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      command - command payload to publish
      Returns:
      true if published successfully, false otherwise

    • getDeviceState

      public String getDeviceState(String deviceId)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Retrieves the current state of a paired device.

      This may return a cached value if the device has been recently queried.

      Specified by:
      getDeviceState in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      Returns:
      current state string (e.g., "ON", "OFF", temperature value), or null if not found

    • addStateChangeListener

      public void addStateChangeListener(IoTIntegrationService.DeviceStateChangeListener listener)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Adds a listener to be notified when a device's state changes via MQTT message.
      Specified by:
      addStateChangeListener in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      listener - callback to invoke with deviceId and new state
